{{Quote|I am Mobvekhar clan Hakh'khar.|Mobvekhar|<ref name="The Last Command" />}}
'''Clan Hakh'khar''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] family that had been transplanted to [[New Nystao]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. Its members included [[Mobvekhar]] and [[Khakraim]].<ref name="Hero's Trial" />

{{Stub}}
